calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff and moving party Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Motion for Attorney's Fees.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc. dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendants.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff's motion is GRANTED. Defendants shall pay attorney fees in the amount of $2,950.00.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed order to the Court no later than September 10, 2009.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by the Defendant(s): Bradley Signature Kitchens and Bath, Inc., a California Corp.; Scott C. Jolley, Jr., aka Scott Jolley, aka Scott Call Jolley, ind. as guarnator of Bradley Signature Kitchens and Baths, Inc.; Vernon Lester Bradley, aka Vernon L. Bradley ind. as guarantor of Bradley Signature Kitchens and Baths, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Pam Frese was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as proposed:
Principal $8,888.98
Civil Damages $1,333.79
Prejudgment Interest $1,624.68
Costs $310.00, for a Total of $12,157.45
Mr. Resner to prepare Judgment for review and signature, Judgment to be summitted to Dept. 218 before June 12, 2009.

June 26, 2009
Judgment granted as follows:
Damages $9,822.77
Prejudgment Interest $1,624.68
Costs $310.00
CCP 1719(a)(1) $105.00, for a total of $11,862.45
Judgment signed by Comm. Gargano.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2009 Set For Trial On Jun-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
